title: How Senior Engineers Actually Build with AI in 2026 | Build a Full Stack Job Applications Platform
summary: JavaScript Mastery presents JobPilot, a full-stack AI job application platform built with nine context files and five open-source agent skills. The tutorial demonstrates the 2026 workflow where engineering skill centers on building systems around AI agents rather than direct coding, using technologies like InsForge, Browserbase, and PostHog for a complete production application.
